title: Personal user - no tenant data in the mobile app
scenario: Guest user in Poly Studio Mobile app shows Tenant name, Tenant ID, and User ID as "None" and Last connected as "Unknown" in Support > App screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Ensure you are logged in as a Guest user (no tenant).
3. Tap the Poly Lens Menu (hamburger menu or menu icon).
expected: For a personal user (no tenant) logged in as Guest, the Tenant name, Tenant ID, and User ID fields should display appropriate values (e.g., "N/A" or be hidden) and Last connected should show a valid timestamp or "N/A".
